zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Menteith於1314年出生在蘇格蘭斯林史爾時，她的父親Sir John Menteith -Lord of Arran43歲，母親Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar23歲。她於大約1323年與Maol Iosa 7th Earl Of Stathearn And Monteith結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1367年3月20日之後在蘇格蘭培爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Menteith于1314年出生在苏格兰斯林史爾时，她的父亲Sir John Menteith -Lord of Arran43岁，母亲Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar23岁。她于大约1323年与Maol Iosa 7th Earl Of Stathearn And Monteith结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1367年3月20日之后在苏格兰培爾。

nameMeanings.name: Menteith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the earldom and province of Menteith in Perthshire, named in Gaelic as ‘hill pasture (above) the Teith’, from monadh ‘hill pasture’ + Teith, a river name of obscure origin. This name was introduced to Ulster at the time of the Plantation in the 17th century, where it is now quite numerous in certain areas, particularly Tyrone.

variants.name: Montooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish   Monteith  .

variants.name: Mantooth
meanings: Probably an altered form of Scottish Monteith orMantach, a nickname from Gaelic manntach ‘stammering’(also ‘toothless’ in Irish), of which one early Welsh recorded form isMantath.

variants.name: Montieth
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Monteith   This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Menteith was born in 1314, in Stirlingshire, Scotland, her father, Sir John Menteith -Lord of Arran, was 43 and her mother, Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar, was 23. She married Maol Iosa 7th Earl Of Stathearn And Monteith about 1323. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died after 20 March 1367, in Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Menteith est née en 1314, à Stirlingshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Menteith -Lord of Arran, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Maol Iosa 7th Earl Of Stathearn And Monteith environ 1323. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 20 mars 1367, à Perthshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Menteith 1314 in Stirlingshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Menteith -Lord of Arran 43 und ihre Mutter Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar 23. Sie hat um 1323 Maol Iosa 7th Earl Of Stathearn And Monteith geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 20. März 1367 in Perthshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Menteith è nata il nel 1314 nel Stirlingshire, Scotland, sua padre, Sir John Menteith -Lord of Arran, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Maol Iosa 7th Earl Of Stathearn And Monteith circa 1323. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 20 marzo 1367, nel Perthshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Menteithが1314年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Menteith -Lord of Arranは43歳，母Helen-nic-Gartnait of Marは23歳であった。約1323年にMaol Iosa 7th Earl Of Stathearn And Monteithと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1367年3月20日以後にスコットランドペルスシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Menteith(이)가 1314년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Menteith -Lord of Arran(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1323년 Maol Iosa 7th Earl Of Stathearn And Monteith(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1367년 3월 20일 이후 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Menteith nasceu em 1314, em Stirlingshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Menteith -Lord of Arran, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Maol Iosa 7th Earl Of Stathearn And Monteith aproximadamente 1323. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 20 de março de 1367, em Perthshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Menteith родилась в 1314 г. в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Sir John Menteith -Lord of Arran было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Maol Iosa 7th Earl Of Stathearn And Monteith около 1323 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 20 марта 1367 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Menteith nació en 1314, en Stirlingshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John Menteith -Lord of Arran, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Helen-nic-Gartnait of Mar, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Maol Iosa 7th Earl Of Stathearn And Monteith aproximadamente 1323. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió después de 20 de marzo de 1367, en Perthshire, Scotland.
